faqs.answer:
The Mody University of Science and Technology placement for 2024 season provided 95% average placement placements to its graduating students. Moreover, over 350 companies took part in placing all the students in top positions across various sectors. faqs.question: Does Mody University of Science and Technology have a good reputation with the placement recruiters?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mody University of Science and Technology has a good reputation with the placement recruiters. The university is visited by top companies for placements such as Mahindra,  Amazon, Godrej, and others. The university is rated 4/5 as per the Shiksha verified review. The university is known to provide one of the best talents present in India. Hence, the recruiters feel interested in picking students from this university.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Mody University?
faqs.answer:
Mody University of Science and Technology provides a unique opportunity for female students all over the world to pursue undergraduate and postgraduate programs through MUSAT (Mody University Scholarship cum Admission Test). The admission process involves three simple steps:
Step 1: Fill and submit the application form online.
Step 2: Download the PDF of the application form from the website, fill it in, and send it along with a Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favour of "Mody University of Science and Technology", payable at Lakshmangarh or Sikar. Mail it to the Central Admissions Office.
Step 3: You can obtain the prospectus and application form in person from the Mody University of Science and Technology, Lakshmangarh office, upon payment of INR 1000 in cash.

college_info.intro: Mody University of Science and Technology popular programmes are BSc and MBA courses. BSc and MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Infosys, Capgemini, TCS, IBM, ICICI Bank, Flipkart, American Express, and others. BSc is available in various specialisations such as Data Science, Physics, Physical Sciences, Chemistry, Life Sciences, French, and others. BSc students can become Data Scientists, Data Analysts, and or can go for various other job profiles. Mody University of Science and Technology students are taught by expert faculty members. The faculty are professionals with various years of experience. Below mentioned are some of the Mody University of Science and Technology courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

The university also provides two MTech Industrial programmes to students. In addition to the above-mentioned courses, the university also has PhD in Science and Languages, PhD in Engineering and Management disciplines, and Integrated PhD courses in Engineering disciplines. faqs.answer: A:    Mody University offers a MBA/PGDM with an overall duration of 2 years. Candidates who are willing to secure admission to this institute can find below the eligibility, selection criteria, fee and more information around Mody University MBA/PGDM admission 2024. The Fees and eligibility for MBA/PGDM is INR 6.3 Lacs - INR 9 lakh and  Eligibility: Class 12 with 45-50% & Graduation with 50% Selection: MUSAT, CAT,  XAT CUET-PG, CMAT

faqs.answer: A:    The CAT exam is always conducted in November every year so CAT 2026 will be conducted in November next year. Students can click here to know more about the CAT examination.
faqs.question: When was CAT 2025 exam conducted?

faqs.answer: A:    Mody University of Science and Technology admission is open for MBA. The university offers entrance-based admission to MBA. The university accepts various entrance exams for MBA such as CAT/XAT/NMAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/GMAT. Further, university also conduct Mody University Entrance Test, followed by PI round. If candidates not have valid score in accepted entrance, they are required to appear in Mody University Entrance Test.  After completing the criteria, candidates are required to visit the university official website to apply for admission.
faqs.question: Can I apply for MBA at Mody University of Science and Technology now?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) + Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with faculty members and placements in 2025 but infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: There are no such good placements offered this year. Only sales companies are coming in which few are fraud as well, having police complain over them, and scamming students. But they guarantee 100% placements. Last year the highest package was 6 LPA - 7 LPA for BBA. For MBA the average salary ranges between 8 LPA - 9 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite great of this college with great library, labs, and classrooms. But hostels are not quite safe nowadays and a lot of illegal things are been done there. The food quality of food is average, no such good medical facilities are available there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The best college with a really fascinating campus.

review_content.Placements: 80-85% of students get placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course ranges from 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package varies between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. TCS, Infosys, and Wipro are some of the top companies in my course. Internships are generally not guaranteed. But at least 70-80% of students are offered internships by companies like Infosys, TCS, etc. Roles offered are data analyst, data scientist, web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Mody University is very fabulous. It has a Wi-Fi connection overall in the building. There are well-facilitated labs and it is very big. There is a huge library and classrooms are also very clean and digitalised. Hostels are very hygienic. The food is also very nice. Mody gives a nice platform for a sports person, it also keeps track offer physical health.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Campus of college is very aesthetic.

review_content.Placements: Placement rates are very high. Every student gets placed in top companies if someone is not capable they also get some package. The highest package is 6 LPA-7 LPA for BCA students. Top companies are Accenture, Deloitte, Amazon, and Myntra. Top roles offered are web developer, data science, digital marketer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very nice from mess to different labs everything is available as per requirement. Library also has all books for different courses. Hostels are also well managed and get cleaned every day. Rooms are also spacious. University campus includes many grounds for all sports both indoor and outdoor.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Campus is very good and aesthetic.

review_content.Placements: It doesn't have placement for BCA and MCA they promised full placement and now they are not referring even one company for BCA. There are at least 30-40 companies for B. Tech and not for BCA they even keep students neglected. And doesn't even worth the money also.
review_content.Infrastructure: Food quality is good but it's not worth the fees they receive. Hostel room quality is very good. Food is also sometimes good and sometimes not good but we get sweets for dinner every day which is the best part. Food according to festivals is also served.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend Mody University as it has the best campus and best facilities.

review_content.Placements: Mody University has an 85% placement rate here and the maximum is 5 LPA, with the minimum being 2 LPA for BCA. Many companies like Flipkart, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Visa, etc., visit for placements. Top roles are software and web developer, data analyst, cyber security analyst, etc. My college has a great percentage of students getting placed. The top companies also prefer it more than your University. It is NAAC A+ rated. It is rated as the best women's University in the Asia Pacific by ASSOCHAM.
review_content.Infrastructure: Mody University has Wi-Fi available for all, very well-facilitated labs, smart classrooms, and a huge library. The hostel is quite nice, and the food is very healthy as everything is done inside the campus. The hostels are very well cleaned, and it has 200+ faculty members and 7 different schools according to your field.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Mody University: In Revel and in Real

review_content.Placements: 100% of students were placed according to the college, but none of us have received the offer letters yet. The highest package was 8.5 LPA, and the lowest was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Bajaj Finance Limited, Colgate Palmolive, Jaro Education, Light Solution, ICICI Prudential, ICICI Securities, Smytten, 99 Acres, PepsiCo, Collebra, and Varun Beverages. None of us got internships from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is just awesome, with labs, smart classrooms with air conditioning, and Wi-Fi. The hostel is also excellent, offering all facilities including mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games. Proper security is available, and transportation within the campus is also provided.

The admission process involves three simple steps:Step 1: Fill and submit the application form online.Step 2: Download the PDF of the application form from the website, fill it in, and send it along with a Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favour of "Mody University of Science and Technology", payable at Lakshmangarh or Sikar. faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process for Mody University?

faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology, formerly Mody University, is a private women's university located in Lakshmangarh in the state of Rajasthan, India. It was established in 1998. The courses offered by the School of Engineering and Technology and the School of Business are duly approved by AICTE. Mody University offers various courses including UG, PG and PhD levels. Admission is both entrance and merit-based- based.
faqs.question: Q: Is Modi university all girls?

faqs.answer: Yes, Mody University of Science and Technology is a good college for BSc. BSc and MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Infosys, Capgemini, TCS, IBM, ICICI Bank, Flipkart, American Express, and others. BSc is available in various specialisations such as Data Science, Physics, Physical Sciences, Chemistry, Life Sciences, French, and others. Hence, Mody University of Science and Technology is a good college for BSc.
faqs.question: Q: Is Mody University of Science and Technology a good college for B.Sc?

faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology offers entrance-based admission to BTech. To be eligible for admission to BTech, candidates must have Class 10 and Class 12 with Pwith Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the subjects Chemistry/Computer science/ Bio-Technology/Biology and adequate proficiency in English from a recognised board. Additionaly, candidates are required to apply and appear for one entrance exam accepted and conducted by the university, such as JEE Mains/MEET. After filling out all the eligibility criteria candidates need to apply for admission form online.

content.Placements: 80-85% of students get placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course ranges from 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package varies between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. TCS, Infosys, and Wipro are some of the top companies in my course. Internships are generally not guaranteed. But at least 70-80% of students are offered internships by companies like Infosys, TCS, etc. Roles offered are data analyst, data scientist, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Mody University is very fabulous. It has a Wi-Fi connection overall in the building. There are well-facilitated labs and it is very big. There is a huge library and classrooms are also very clean and digitalised. Hostels are very hygienic. The food is also very nice. Mody gives a nice platform for a sports person, it also keeps track offer physical health.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Campus of college is very aesthetic.

content.Placements: Placement rates are very high. Every student gets placed in top companies if someone is not capable they also get some package. The highest package is 6 LPA-7 LPA for BCA students. Top companies are Accenture, Deloitte, Amazon, and Myntra. Top roles offered are web developer, data science, digital marketer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very nice from mess to different labs everything is available as per requirement. Library also has all books for different courses. Hostels are also well managed and get cleaned every day. Rooms are also spacious. University campus includes many grounds for all sports both indoor and outdoor.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Campus is very good and aesthetic.

content.Placements: It doesn't have placement for BCA and MCA they promised full placement and now they are not referring even one company for BCA. There are at least 30-40 companies for B. Tech and not for BCA they even keep students neglected. And doesn't even worth the money also.
content.Infrastructure: Food quality is good but it's not worth the fees they receive. Hostel room quality is very good. Food is also sometimes good and sometimes not good but we get sweets for dinner every day which is the best part. Food according to festivals is also served.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend Mody University as it has the best campus and best facilities.

content.Placements: Mody University has an 85% placement rate here and the maximum is 5 LPA, with the minimum being 2 LPA for BCA. Many companies like Flipkart, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Visa, etc., visit for placements. Top roles are software and web developer, data analyst, cyber security analyst, etc. My college has a great percentage of students getting placed. The top companies also prefer it more than your University. It is NAAC A+ rated. It is rated as the best women's University in the Asia Pacific by ASSOCHAM.
content.Infrastructure: Mody University has Wi-Fi available for all, very well-facilitated labs, smart classrooms, and a huge library. The hostel is quite nice, and the food is very healthy as everything is done inside the campus. The hostels are very well cleaned, and it has 200+ faculty members and 7 different schools according to your field.

admission_overview.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: Mody University of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mody University of Science and Technology admission is open.The university offers courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such as JEE Main, GATE, NATA, NEET, CAT, XAT, NMAT, CMAT and others.Mody University of Science and Technologyalso conducts university-based entrance exams and interviews for both UG and PG courses. Further, for admission to some UG and PG courses university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission to any course can apply on the official website of the university. To know more about Mody University of Science and Technology admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

Mody University of Science and Technology admission is primarily entrance-based. Further, for some courses, the university offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. The university offers different programmes under various schools, such as School of Business, School of Design, School of Engineering, and others, at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The courses includeBA, MA,MSc, BTech,MBA, PhD, and others. Candidates looking for admission to Mody University of Science and Technology must have a bachelor's degree for admission to PG courses and have passed Class 12 for admission to UG courses. Additionally, applicants are required to appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for their desired course. Given below are the eligibility and selection criteria for Mody University of Science and Technology courses:

Pass Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the subjects Chemistry/Computer science/ Bio-Technology/Biology and adequate proficiency in English
Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream with proficiency in English from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream in proficiency in English with 45% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics with 50% aggregate
10+3 with subjects of Mathematics with 50% aggregate
Graduation degree in any discipline with 50% aggregate
CAT/ XAT/NMAT/ CMAT/MAT/ ATMA/GMAT/ Mody University Entrance Test +PI
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreMody University of Science and Technology courses
Download:Mody University of Science and Technology Broucher

Mody University of Science and Technology admission process 2025 includes various steps that must be completed by all candidates to get admission into the university. The process starts with the submission of an application form, followed by a course-specific entrance exam, and other selection rounds if applicable. After the selection rounds, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of Mody University. Candidates who get shortlisted are required to submit the necessary fee to confirm their final seat. Find below theMody University of Science and Technology admission process:

Candidates looking for admission to Mody University must apply for admission by going to the official website of the university or visiting the university campus directly for offline application. The application process is conducted in online and offline modes.

Once the application window is closed, applicants are required to apply and appear for a course-specific entrance exam and other selection rounds as well. For some courses the university conducts and accepts, national-level exam scores for admission. Further, for some courses, the university offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. Once all selection rounds are complete, Mody University of Science and Technology released course-wise merit lists on the official website.
Applicants who get shortlisted in the selection round are required to pay a certain amount ofMody University of Science and Technology feeto lock the final seat.

faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology offers entrance-based admission to some of its UG, PG and PhD courses, such as BTech, BArch, MBA, BA LLB and others. Further, for some courses like BA, BCA, Bcom, MCom, and others university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission to any of these courses must appear for various entrance exams which includes CAT/XAT/NMAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/GMAT/JEE Main/ Mody University Entrance Test and other. Further, for direct admission, candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for UG courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Mody University?
faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology provides a unique opportunity for female students all over the world to pursue undergraduate and postgraduate programs through MUSAT (Mody University Scholarship cum Admission Test). The admission process involves three simple steps:Step 1:Fill and submit the application form online.Step 2:Download the PDF of the application form from the website, fill it in, and send it along with a Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favour of "Mody University of Science and Technology", payable at Lakshmangarh or Sikar. Mail it to the Central Admissions Office.Step 3:You can obtain the prospectus and application form in person from the Mody University of Science and Technology, Lakshmangarh office, upon payment of INR 1000 in cash.

faqs.question: When was CAT 2025 exam conducted?
faqs.answer: The CAT exam is always conducted in November every year so CAT 2026 will be conducted in November next year. Students can clickhereto know more about the CAT examination.

Mody University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. rankings.highlight: 9th Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Rajasthan In 2025

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Mody University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Mody University fell 300 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Mody University fell 105 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The campus has 28 hostels, all of which are air-conditioned except for 3 hostels. Each hostel houses 180 students and each student can choose between single, double or four-bed facilities with an option of AC or non AC rooms. Each room comes with ample storage capacity and are well furnished and well-ventilated. All hostel floors have been equipped with water coolers with the latest RO technology and students can also enjoy 24×7 Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with faculty members and placements in 2025 but infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite great of this college with great library, labs, and classrooms. But hostels are not quite safe nowadays and a lot of illegal things are been done there. The food quality of food is average, no such good medical facilities are available there.

reviews.review_heading: The best college with a really fascinating campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Mody University is very fabulous. It has a Wi-Fi connection overall in the building. There are well-facilitated labs and it is very big. There is a huge library and classrooms are also very clean and digitalised. Hostels are very hygienic. The food is also very nice. Mody gives a nice platform for a sports person, it also keeps track offer physical health.

reviews.review_heading: Campus of college is very aesthetic.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice from mess to different labs everything is available as per requirement. Library also has all books for different courses. Hostels are also well managed and get cleaned every day. Rooms are also spacious. University campus includes many grounds for all sports both indoor and outdoor.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is very good and aesthetic.
reviews.review_text: Food quality is good but it's not worth the fees they receive. Hostel room quality is very good. Food is also sometimes good and sometimes not good but we get sweets for dinner every day which is the best part. Food according to festivals is also served.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend Mody University as it has the best campus and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Mody University has Wi-Fi available for all, very well-facilitated labs, smart classrooms, and a huge library. The hostel is quite nice, and the food is very healthy as everything is done inside the campus. The hostels are very well cleaned, and it has 200+ faculty members and 7 different schools according to your field.

reviews.review_heading: Mody University: In Revel and in Real
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is just awesome, with labs, smart classrooms with air conditioning, and Wi-Fi. The hostel is also excellent, offering all facilities including mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games. Proper security is available, and transportation within the campus is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Make you career mood happy with mody University.
reviews.review_text: Overall, college infrastructure is good, but MBA buildings have weird infrastructure. You will find peacocks and temples in the campus area. The college annual festival, Unayaan, is celebrated on a large scale in November. Teachers provide study material; notes and books are available in the library. Colleges have Wi-Fi. You can search for any information by sitting in classrooms, but you are restricted to downloading movies from Wi-Fi. Classroom amenities are good; they provide comfortable chai...

reviews.review_heading: The placement rate is good and overall, other things are fine.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing; bad air conditioning labs and a well-equipped library are the best. To be honest, if you live on campus, you are not allowed to leave or order food, and the mess food is terrible. Students are dissatisfied with the food quality.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mody University.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities were provided at the university, such as Wi-Fi, library, labs, etc. The hostel too had all the basic necessities such as tables, mattresses, etc. The quality of food was pretty good, but the taste could be better. There is a clinic on campus, but it is not free. There are courts and grounds for almost all the commonly played sports. There is a horse-riding ground too, and a lot of students get involved in one or more sports.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing Mody University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All our Laboratories are filled with highly equipped instruments which are needed for practicals. A large number of faculty members and technicians work here. Around 60+ buses are running regularly from our college campus. All the medical facilities are available within our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Get the best experience with Mody University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent, having thousands of trees and herbs, birds, peacock and other beauties. Wi-Fi is available 24*7 and the classroom is comfortable with smart boards, air airconditioning and very comfortable sitting amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Top-notch Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university boasts top-notch infrastructure. The expansive and scenic surroundings feature trees, mountains, and various flowers, creating a pleasant environment. The library is spacious and well-stocked with books. Classrooms are large, and the labs are well-equipped with modern facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A best college which provides good placement opportunity!
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilis one of the best facility in Mody University. You will find one of the best hostel facility in private colleges in Rajasthan. Here you will get rooms on double and triple sharing basis. Rooms are available in both AC and NON AC format. Food served in the mess is proper food with no onion and garlic in it.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, time, and a life time experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure plays an important role before choosing any college because it does help us shape us. This college have great infra with good facilities and greenery around. There are around more than 20 hostel building with emmense facilities there and a horse Riding ground, football, hockey, bollyball and many more sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mody University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are well-established and well-maintained classrooms. Our labs are equipped with high-end IBM and Accenture systems. Our college infrastructure is excellent. The mess food is good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Mody University of Science and Technology

likes.text: Companies like Accenture, Infosysy, IBM, John Deere, Mahindra and Mahindra, Oracle, Honeywell are top recruiters.
Students did their internship in companies like Outlook Magazine, HDFC Bank, Regal Shipping, etc.

paragraphs: Mody University of Science and Technology (MUST) is a popular private university in Lakshmangarh, Rajasthan. It has various programs for women students. The university has Grade-A+ certification by the NAAC and is recognised by UGC, BCI, and AICTE. MUST is a member of the AIU and the Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business, and provides popular programs like BTech and BSc.

MUST Lakshamangarh is committed to providing quality higher education to deserving girl students, despite financial barriers. The university has several scholarship schemes for students, depending on both the merit and entrance-test basis. Also, students can benefit from diverse special scholarship programs. Also, the beneficiary students must have no backlog, no disciplinary action, and have 75% attendance.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bhausaheb Mulak Ayurved Mahavidyalaya and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: Our course does not have placements and also internship opportunities. None of the students got placed from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully equipped with all the best facilities for students. It has a huge infrastructure, and it is enabled with Wi-Fi facilities. There is a huge canteen inside the campus, and there is also a huge library.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers here are qualified, and they all are professionals. Their way of teaching completely depends on the practical approach. Lectures which are scheduled are conducted on their respective time. Teachers are very helpful and put a lot of efforts for the student's growth.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good among all the private colleges of Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: There were no such things as placements, but you could secure a job after experiencing RHC and PHC and by doing private practice. Patient flow was low in the college hospital, but you could learn a few things if you were interested. However, you had to depend heavily on practice outside the hospital to gain knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hospital infrastructure was good. Almost all the amenities were available in the hospital. The college building provided a library and canteen as well. The college had a hostel which was in collaboration with the engineering and pharmacy hostels. The hostel infrastructure was not good.

highlights.summary: The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: B.Pharma course is valuable if we go abroad.

review_content.Placements: In India, usually, pharmacy courses have no importance. People SEE pharmacists dispense medicine. But pharmacists have an essential role in the development of drugs and their evaluation. Students are not looking for a placement in an Indian company. They want to perform in foreign countries because foreign countries provide more salaries and opportunities in the Pharma field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. They provide all the facilities like Wi-Fi, mess, transport, hostel, and football turf that is enough for a student. My hostel has separate rooms for each year's batch of students. Also, provide good food with affordable value. They also offer sports, games, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, facilities, and a good campus life.

review_content.Placements: Above 80%, no package fee, all are the same. Students must clear all papers and should have more than 80% in their plus two. They can start a shop or work in a hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Student Wi-Fi, computer lab, library for reference, canteen for food, microbiology lab, pathology lab, all are available. The environment is good, the campus is good, and facilities and faculty staff are all perfect. Classrooms have projectors. Hostel food is okay. Sports are conducted every year.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are good and helpful, and the staff is well qualified. Companies are good and the teaching methods are good. The course is very relevant. Semester exams are quite tough. Students who score 50% marks can take the university exam. Teachers are very helpful and professional. Students can work independently. The fee structure for the first semester of the first year is Rs.1,35,000. There are 8 semesters in this course, and the fee is the same for all eight semesters. Students can work independently.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for learning and best infrastructure in this range.

review_content.Placements: After MBBS, many students of batch 13,14 and 15 have cracked NEET PG in their desirable branch and the highest rank in NEET PG was AIR 216 and INI CET was 208 which is really impressive for a new college like VIMS. Top colleges in which the students are pursuing their postgraduate includes Maulana Azad medical College and AIIMS Patna. Top branches received was MD radiology and MD medicine.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are the best one can get in the medical Colleges of this range. Lecture theatre, labs and library are adorable and all departments are well functioning. Quality of food in mess and sports facilities are also good. Cricket and badminton tournaments are conducted in sports weeks before college foundation day.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a well-established college with all facilities and excellent infrastructure.

The selection ratio in NEET and PG entrance is also very good. Some also do their job on the campus hospital even after completing their internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is excellent, and it is the best medical college in Bihar. All the basic and necessary facilities are given in the hostel. The hostel is also located on the campus. Our college campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Mess is also given by this college administration. The quality of food is healthy and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: A medical from city chaos, distraction and exposure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is sound. Campus space is also big. You will get hostel facility even from 1st year itself. There is seperate buildings for boys and girls hostel. Academics building, building recreation hall, auditorium, playground, canteen etc. Are present.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for learning and best infrastructure in this range.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are the best one can get in the medical Colleges of this range. Lecture theatre, labs and library are adorable and all departments are well functioning. Quality of food in mess and sports facilities are also good. Cricket and badminton tournaments are conducted in sports weeks before college foundation day.

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-established college with all facilities and excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is excellent, and it is the best medical college in Bihar. All the basic and necessary facilities are given in the hostel. The hostel is also located on the campus. Our college campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Mess is also given by this college administration. The quality of food is healthy and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Bmimsonian medlife filled with ups and downs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college matches with the infrastructure of renowned AIIMS institutes of India. It has a well-constructed academic building, hostels, and playgrounds. The cricket ground, volleyball court, badminton court, recreation halls, table tennis, and other games are available on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college, and students will not regret joining here.

content.Placements: As it is an MBBS degree, students have to write other exams like USMLE or PLAB for placements or go abroad. MBBS is a professional degree. It takes 5 years to complete, including 1 year of compulsory internship. During internships, we work in various departments.
content.Infrastructure: The college was established in 2019, so everything is new and in very good condition. There are almost 19 departments. Classrooms have air conditioners and fans. They are well-ventilated. Labs like biochemistry, physiology, pathology, and dissection hall, are available. The hostel is also new and has all the facilities like a water cooler, mess, playground, volleyball court, etc. Mess food is good. In the evening, all students play both outdoor and indoor games.

overview_faqs.question: Can Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science is a renowned institution offering Certificate, M.A, M.Com, M.Sc, BBA, B.A, B.Com, BBM/BMS, B.Sc, UG Diploma, BCA. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of IT & Software, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Business & Management Studies, Humanities & Social Sciences, Medicine & Health Sciences, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science boasts an impressive review rating of 4.37 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.6 for Campus Life, 3.9 for Placements, 4.29 for Faculty, and 4.72 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with everything out there.

content.Placements: 70 percent of the students of the college get placements. The highest package offered is 24 LPA, and the lowest is 9 LPA. TCS, Wipro, L&T Infotech, Infosys, and HDFC Bank are the major recruiters. 90 percent of students are placed in Wipro, 5 percent in TCS, and the rest in L&T as developers, full stack developers, and data scientists.
content.Infrastructure: We have air-conditioned labs, a clean and cozy library, and well-structured classrooms. The canteen food quality is good. There are sports facilities in the gymkhana and also medical facilities. There are many more factors about this college. We have a great time here. It is definitely worth it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a good campus. It provides skill development.

content.Placements: Mostly, the percentage via merit list goes up to 65 % depending on the course. The highest package offered is 34 LPA by Flipkart. The average package ranges from 4-7 LPA. The main recruiters mostly include Tata, Flipkart, Wipro, TCS, Infosys, Dyson, and many top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure-wise, it offers Wi-Fi, computer labs, and my personal favourite place library, as it is actually very peaceful. There are books for readers like me. It has smart classrooms. The hostel is 2-3 KM away and a 5-minute of walking distance. There are great facilities like Wi-Fi, indoor games, a gym, and a good canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and facilities for students who are looking for admission in 2025.

content.Placements: I have done a B.Com regular from Pillai College, and I have learned many things from my college. The top companies that visit our college for placements are Wipro, Infosys, IDBI Bank, etc. I suggest students go and grab their seats before it is going to full and enjoy their college life.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good. It has clean and modern computer labs. The canteen is the best part of the college. I suggest students to visit here. The food is affordable, and South food is the best part. Cold coffee is a must-try thing, and it is the most satisfying thing after a lecture.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is very good in terms of infrastructure, curriculum, and college life.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed. The average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, and IBM these companies are the main companies where computer science students are placed. Pillai College of Commerce Arts and Science are good in terms of this.
content.Infrastructure: Canteen food is not that good but average. Hostel facilities are very good and college infrastructure is awesome. The buildings of the college, the wings, and rooms are very good, especially the sitting area in free time or labs for students' practicals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Accounting and Finance - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college because of good placements, infrastructure, and teaching staff.

content.Placements: Pillai College provides placements to each course student. In my batch, 78% of students are placed. The highest package is 15 LPA. The lowest package offered is 5 LPA. There are top-rated and recruiting companies in my course. Almost 70% of students intend in the course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. There are computer labs, a library, sports, a game area, and a canteen facility. The food quality is excellent in the canteen. There are many types of games to play like chess, carrom, table tennis, etc. All the medical facilities are been provided here.

It has a well-built area for sports, a hall for events, and an auditorium for celebrity appearances.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommend Pillai College because of the amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Clean classrooms with projectors in each classroom and a very huge library with great infrastructure and a computer lab on each floor. The provided infrastructure is amazing and recommendable. It is the best college in Navi Mumbai. I highly recommend taking admission to Pillai College, and for the hostel, a very clean hostel is provided and the food is also hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It was a good 3 years there with a good crowd and best facilities. Good support from teachers.
reviews.review_text: It was great in all terms, with a great convention room, lab, library, sports group, and all facilities. It has a great ambience, AC rooms, and affordable canteen food. Huge large-scale events and great celebrity visits. Different committees for dance, marketing, and management were made.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a satisfying college.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in a hostel. There are two separate hostels for men and women. The classrooms are clean. The food is served three times a day and the quality of the food is also good. As going to course, it is quite a simple course and the college infrastructure is good as it can accommodate 50-60 students in a class.

reviews.review_heading: Pillai College has the best events in Navi Mumbai. Pillai College is famous for events only.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Pillai College is good. Each course has its own department, and Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. The classrooms are neat and well-maintained, and there's a library for students to study in.

reviews.review_heading: Come to Pillai and have a look and review
reviews.review_text: We have every facility available in our college, just name it. We have a lab, football court, gym, hangout spots, classrooms, extracurricular events, fests, fun events, library, canteen, basketball court, badminton and many more things which you will enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and fun college for events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best . The college's premises are very well maintained and all the facilities are provided, such as a library, gym, basketball court, canteen, and sitting area. All such areas are very well maintained by the college.

reviews.review_heading: A bundle of new opportunities and experiences!!!
reviews.review_text: The campus is the best at Pillai Institution of Arts, Commerce, and Science. A great and hygienic canteen is provided for us. The washrooms are clean, the corridors, facilities, and auditorium are all top-notch. Students are also provided parking areas, which most colleges don’t have. The library offers a great and peaceful environment where we can read and study. Overall, the infrastructure of this college deserves an 11/10.

reviews.review_heading: A story about Pillai College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Pillai College BBA Department is very good and spacious, with AC classrooms provided for the students. The library is also very large, catering to students from every stream, and the college places a strong emphasis on sports.

highlights.summary: Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University admissions 2026 is expected to open around May/June 2026. A few more updates are as follows:

table.details: Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University, Uttarakhand Technical University

college_info.intro:
Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University offers UG, PG, and doctoral programmes across various streams such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Architecture, Computer Application, and others. BTech, BPharma, and MBA are popular programmes offered at Uttarakhand Technical University.
The institute offers BTech specialisation in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, and others. The institute also offers lateral entry to the BTech students. VMSB UTU offers MBA specialisations for the two years of programmes in various specialisations.
Below-mentioned are Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University's popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    In the field of engineering, VMSB UTU's M.Tech students have many opportunities. Candidates might pursue careers as Robotics Engineers, Thermal Engineers, Mechatronics Engineers, Project Managers, among others. Among the most sought-after post-MTech careers for VMSB UTU students are as follows:MTech JobsAverage M Tech Salary (INR)VLSI Design EngineerINR 13.5 LPAEmbedded Systems EngineerINR 6.6 LPARobotics EngineerINR 4.2 LPAData Scientist (MTech in CS/Data Science)INR 14.7 LPACommunication
faqs.question: What are the career opportunities for M.Tech graduates of VMSB UTU?

faqs.answer: A:    The placement situation for MBA at UTU - Uttarakhand Technical University is not very good.Only a small number of students in our college secure placements,and the companies that come offer packages that are not enough for many. There aren't a lot of companies that visit the college for recruitment.The average package is 5.5 lakhs per annum Top companies are tcs sprinkler Airtel BCN bain, etc College has a dedicated placement cell for mba and students are highly qualified.
faqs.question: How are MBA placements at UTU - Uttarakhand Technical University?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into the MBA programme at UTU - Uttarakhand Technical University, you usually need to pass national-level entrance exams such as CAT (Common Admission Test).The main eligibility requirement is having a minimum of 60% in your bachelor's degree from a recognised institute.Utu is a esteed University and to get admission you need to work consistently and get 90 percentile atleast.The average package which you will get is around 10 lakhs per annum.Utu after cat also takes interview for admission and finally student is admitted to college
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does UTU - Uttarakhand Technical University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for M.Tech programmes at VMSB UTU ranges from INR 80.5 K to INR 2.3 lakh. In addition to the tuition fee, the course fee structure will include a number of other fee components, including the admission fee, security amount, and other fees. Some of the fees are chargeable only once, such as the security deposit and admission fee, while others are to be paid annually, including the tuition fee.NOTE: The mentioned fee is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the course fee for the two-year M.Tech programmes at VMSB UTU?

faqs.answer: A:    Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University admission is baased on merit and entrance exams. Students must check the eligibility criteria set by the uiversity for the desired courses. The below-mentioned are VMSB UTU eligibility criteria has been mentioned below: CoursesEligibilityBTech10+2 : 45-60 %Exams : CBSE 12th JEE Main+8 MoreBSc10+2 : 45-50 %Exams : CBSE 12th UK 12th+2 MoreMBA/PGDM10+2 : 45 %Graduation : 50 %Exams : MAT CAT+7 MoreBPharma10+2 : 45 %Exams : UKSEE CBSE 12th+3 MoreBBA10+2 : 45-60 %Exams : CBSE 12th UK 12th+1 MoreM.TechGraduation : 50 %Exams : GATE UKSEE+1 MoreMPharmaGraduation : 55 %Exams : GPAT UKSEE

faqs.answer: A:    The fees at  UTU - Uttarakhand Technical University ranges from Rs 45,000 to Rs 2,00,000 for the different course at the college while the fees for Doon University ranges from Rs 65000 to 2,10,000 for the different courses at the college. So comparsing the general fees structure of the collegs it can be said that UTU is not more expensive than Doon University and it provides the students with their ROI after completing the courses from the college.

faqs.answer: To secure admission to the BTech course at Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University (VMSB UTU), applicants must have passed Class 12 (or equivalent) with a minimum of 45% marks (40% for SC/ST categories) in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, or must be in possession of an equivalent diploma/B.Sc. degree with a minimum stipulated marks. Applicants then have to submit online on the official site, pay the application fee, and go through centralized counselling based on their score in entrance tests like JEE Main. After that, there is the UTU counselling, where there is allotment of seats, confirmation, and reporting at the allotted institute as the last part.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission to VMSB UTU for BTech?

faqs.answer: To get admission in Uttarakhand Technical University, students have to check the eligibility first. Eligible students can then apply online. The university selects students through entrance + counselling basis. Students who get shortlisted have to pay the admission fees. Fee payment has to be done to confirm admission.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission in Uttarakhand Technical University?

review_summary.college_name: UTU Uttarakhand Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.

content.Placements: There are 90% of students who were placed in the B.Tech course this year. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA in top companies like Swaraj, Mahindra, and Robbins.
content.Infrastructure: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Campus life is very good here. Other than that everything is average or below average.

content.Placements: The placements are not good here. It's below average for even computer and IT department students. So forget about the placements for civil students. Students take this degree for government job preparation qualifications. If you are joining a civil, don't rely solely on the placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: It is not as bad as others, but yes, it's pretty decent, I would say, because they maintain the building nicely. It lacks the modern, glossy feel of private universities. The central library is one of the largest in India. This is the gateway for GATE/IES preparation materials.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: I will complete B.Tech in Computer Science (2025-2029). Around 75-80% students are placed. The highest package is about 20 LPA, the lowest 3 LPA, and the average is 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 60% got internships as developers or analysts.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Faculty are well-educated and good enough to teach.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students get placement in my course. Actually, the department of Computer Science and Engineering has the maximum number of placements recently. The highest package is approximately 37 LPA, and the minimum package is 3.4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have a football ground or athletic ground in our campus and a badminton court in boys’ hostel. We also get medical services here. We have a mess where we get only vegetarian food. The mess has a repeated menu of food. Milk provided in the morning seems to be water.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

admission_overview.college_name: UTU Uttarakhand Admission 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Courses & Dates

admission_overview.title: Uttarakhand Technical University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Uttarakhand Technical University admissions are offered on an entrance basis primarily. The university offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma level courses. These courses are provided in the fields of Technology, Management, Science, Pharmacy, Education, Law, Commerce, and more. Now known as Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University and more commonly known as VMSB UTU and UTU, the university conducts admission and application in online mode. To secure their admission to the university, students must meet the course-wise admission criteria. The admission cycle usually is from April to June. Candidates can go through the following sections to know of the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, fees, and the admission process at Uttarakhand Technical University.

eligibility_selection.title: Uttarakhand Technical University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Uttarakhand Technical University course admission is based on students fulfilling the preset admission criteria. It varies according to the programme selected by the students. The university admits candidates by the set selection procedure. UTU offers the courses through its different affiliated colleges. The general eligibility is as below: The table below mentions eligibility and selection details for some of the popular Uttarakhand Technical University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: MAT| UKSEE| CAT| GATE| XAT| CMAT| ATMA

paragraphs: Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical Universityadmissionis entrance-based for most of the courses. The university accepts different national and state-level exams for its different entrance-based. Students can enrol in an extensive range of programmes provided across multiple specialisations. The courses are offered in full-time and regular mode.

TheUttarakhand Technical University admission processstarts with an eligibility check followed by application submission and shortlisting of students based on the admission criteria. Students seeking to apply for the course must meet the admission criteria as per the university's guidelines. Eligible students can refer to the following steps to know the detailed UTU admission process:
Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University Application Process

The application process for UTU is conducted online. Hence, eligible students can visit the official website to apply. For application submission, an application fee has to be paid. Interested students can visit the official website of the university and fill out the application form available.

In the next step, candidates are shortlisted based on merit in the last qualifying exam or score in the accepted exam. The university also gives spot counselling to the students. Eligible candidates can visit the website to apply for counselling and go through the process as directed by the UTU.

After all the selection rounds, candidates must submit the important documents and pay the admission fee for seat confirmation. The course commencement date and other details shall be provided by the university.

Uttarakhand Technical University's total tuition feeis inclusive of different components, such as tuition fees, admission fees, medical insurance, cautionary deposits, etc. Some of the fee components need to be paid only once, while the remaining ones need to be paid either semester-wise or yearly, whichever way, the university decides. The fee varies as per the course and specialisation selected by the candidates. Find belowVeer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University feesfor popular courses:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.

Uttarakhand Technical University's total seat intakedepends on different factors, such as the competition pool, number of applicants, etc. The university gives the course through its different affiliated colleges. paragraphs: Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University Faqs:

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after pursuing an MBA from Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University?
faqs.answer: VMSB UTU MBA graduates may choose to pursue careers in government, which offers job security, stability, and a suitable balance between work and family life for its employees. Some pouplar MBA career trends in the government space include: Economist through the Indian Economic Service (IES) Examination Reserve Bank of India Grade B Officer Staff Selection Commission Officer Probationary Officer for Government Banks IAS, IPS, and IFS through the entrance exam UPSC CSE NOTE: The aforementioned data is as per the various sources. It is still subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for BTech at VMSB UTU?
faqs.answer: The latest VMSB UTU BTech placement report has not been released. However, according to the students' review on Shiksha, many top companies visited the campus for recruitments. The highest and average packages given to students in the placement drive were INR 13 LPA and INR 10 LPA, and INR 2.5 LPA, respectively. Additionally, the topmost package was provided by Amazon, TCAS, and Cisco.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at UTU - Uttarakhand Technical University?
faqs.answer: The placement situation for MBA at UTU - Uttarakhand Technical University is not very good. Only a small number of students in our college secure placements,and the companies that come offer packages that are not enough for many. There aren't a lot of companies that visit the college for recruitment. The average package is 5.5 lakhs per annum Top companies are tcs sprinkler Airtel BCN bain, etc College has a dedicated placement cell for mba and students are highly qualified.

faqs.question: What are the government jobs that I can seek after completing BPharm from Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University?
faqs.answer: VMSB UTU can provide a tremendous amount of career opportunities for BPharm graduates. Opportunities exist in both the private and government sectors. The most popular job opportunities in the government sector for BPharm graduates from VMSB UTU include: Railway Executive Assistant Professor (Pharmacy) Hospital Pharmacist Quality Assurance Officer in Pharm Hospital Pharmacist Government Tender/Bidding/ Manager Assistant Professor Integrated School of Pharmacy Operations Executive Pharmacy NOTE: The above-mentioned data is taken from the various sources. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.
reviews.review_text: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Campus life is very good here. Other than that everything is average or below average.
reviews.review_text: It is not as bad as others, but yes, it's pretty decent, I would say, because they maintain the building nicely. It lacks the modern, glossy feel of private universities. The central library is one of the largest in India. This is the gateway for GATE/IES preparation materials.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Tula's InstituteReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty are well-educated and good enough to teach.
reviews.review_text: We have a football ground or athletic ground in our campus and a badminton court in boys’ hostel. We also get medical services here. We have a mess where we get only vegetarian food. The mess has a repeated menu of food. Milk provided in the morning seems to be water.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.
reviews.review_text: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Roorkee Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A good college with great academics and a great environment. Juniors are welcome here.
reviews.review_text: At RIT Roorkee, all classrooms and Wi-Fi are good. Sometimes, we face problems in the library, but overall, it is good. The food is also good and not like home. Overall, it is okay and normal. Sometimes, it is very good. Overall, the college is the best.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is mainly for the HOD curriculum, and there is a lack of sports facilities. However, if you talk about studies, proper management and facilities for the students and their future, the college infrastructure is good for the students who mainly focus on academics. Nevertheless, it lacks in providing that benefit for students who focus on extracurricular activities like sports and other pursuits.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, decent campus life. Average placements.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure available for the course are decent. Wi-Fi is rather slow but okay. There is a library at the top. Classrooms contain projectors with whiteboards. Some contain smart boards. The quality of food available in the mess is not so good, but okay. There are vending machines in every hostel, so you don't have to go to the canteen. The canteen contains good quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All in all, DBUU can be a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Here we are provided with two tables, as the room is a 2-seater, and you can choose the number of seats you want. There are two beds, one almirah, and an attached room with a commode and basin. The cleaners come every day to clean the room, and on Sundays, the washrooms are cleaned. The hostel with a three-seater non-attached washrooms room is 80,000, and the 2-seater with attached washrooms is 110,000 with a 5,000 registration fee. I would suggest taking a PG or rented apartment; it will cost h...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by THDC Institute of Hydropower Engineering and Technology (THDC-IHET)
reviews.review_heading: THDC-IHET - Strong infrastructure, supportive faculty, and growing career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is lush green and pollution-free in a hill region near the Tehri Lake, offering a peaceful environment for study. It has a good infrastructure. There is a strong library and labs with Wi-Fi on campus. The hostel and canteen are good. Sports, gym, and health services are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Not very good. I will advise you not to join this college if you are not from a very rich background
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay, not too good, not too bad. A middle-class student can easily survive here. Medical facilities are not average here. Sports facilities are good. Mess food is average, not too good, not too bad. Sometimes you also have to eat outside the canteen, so be ready for that.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Tula's InstituteReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average because of facilities and placement.
reviews.review_text: All types of labs and workshops necessary for mechanical engineering students are available, and hostel facilities are neither very good nor very bad. Food in the mess is okay, medical facilities in the hostel are to be improved, and sports and game facilities are very awesome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Women Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 3 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Women Institute of Technology – A College in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are still not available in the college, but there are many other private hostels present outside the college area in which you can enroll or register whenever you come for admission. The college provides all the information regarding these hostels which are nearby the college. Also, these hostels are not very expensive.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Tula's InstituteReviewed on 2 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: They provide all the facilities which we need for the whole year until our program. The facilities are awesome. It has 24-hour water and electricity facilities. Just a tiny 30-minute tank filling will be there in the day, otherwise the water runs 27X7. The warden is very helpful. If we have any issues to discuss, they will solve them the next day.

reviews_list.review_title: The best decision for my future.

review_content.Placements: As it is a medical college, there are no placements. But internships are offered by the college in its own hospital. The top roles offered in this course are general physician, specials doctor, family doctor and in government services. Every student can opt for an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. There is a garden area, an auditorium, a gym, a hostel, a hospital, etc. Classrooms are big with projector facilities, and library contains every needful book. The hostel is well ventilated, and the quality of food is good. A table, bed, toilets and bathrooms are provided in rooms. 24/7 electricity and water supply are available. The food is given according to the menu and it tastes good. Medical facilities are provided as the college has its own OPD. Every year, a sports day is organized, and festivals are so interesting. content.Placements: As it is a medical college, there are no placements. But internships are offered by the college in its own hospital. The top roles offered in this course are general physician, specials doctor, family doctor and in government services. Every student can opt for an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. There is a garden area, an auditorium, a gym, a hostel, a hospital, etc. Classrooms are big with projector facilities, and library contains every needful book. The hostel is well ventilated, and the quality of food is good. A table, bed, toilets and bathrooms are provided in rooms. 24/7 electricity and water supply are available. The food is given according to the menu and it tastes good. Medical facilities are provided as the college has its own OPD. Every year, a sports day is organized, and festivals are so interesting. Everybody participates in them. So many games are played.

college_info.intro:
GRD Institute of Management and Technology popular programmes include courses such as BSc, BTech and BPharma, offered in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses for the duration ranging from 3 years to 4 years. Admission to respective courses is based on merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation, depending on the level of the course opted for.
Moreover, the GRD IMT fee structure includes tuition fees ranging from INR 90K to INR 5.2 Lakh. For a course such as BSc, the annual intake is of 180 students, whereas, for BTech, the annual intake is of 510 students. BPharma on the other hand, is offered with an annual intake of 100 students. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I would not recommend joining this college.

review_content.Placements: To be honest with you sir/mam. Less than 50% of students got placed in my course. If we talk about the highest package it's around 1-2 LPA, the average package is around 1 LPA and the lowest package is Rs. 70,000 - Rs. 80,000. Top recruiters are TCS, Bebo, and Rubicon. Below 30% of students got internships. Top roles offered are engineering, data science, and cyber security.
review_content.Infrastructure: They don't even have Wi-Fi connections for each floor which makes it difficult to stay connected to Wi-Fi. Labs are decent not too good. Classrooms are good. The library is good, a place for students to study and work. Some of my friends are from the hostel. So they always talk about they give bad food, roti is very hard to eat, we are suffering here. If we look at the hostel building from the outside it will look fine but from the inside it's dirty, I'm not lying. The canteen is good there but they have expired food. Medical facilities are normal. Sports are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college review about placements, environment, college life, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 40% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Smart Data Enterprises, and Infosys visit the college for placements. The internship percentage in our college is about 30%, and most of the internships are unpaid. Top roles like software engineers and testers are offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have two grounds, one ground is big and the other is small. The library is well-facilitated and has Wi-Fi. There is a mess and canteen. Sports facilities are good but not up to the mark. Mess food quality is superb. It does not have medical facilities. We have a computer lab and a pharmacy lab.

overview_faqs.question: Is there a merit-based scholarship available for BCom students at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: At GRD Institute of Management and Technology (GRD IMT), merit-based scholarships are available for BCom students as well, who have demonstrated outstanding academic performance in their previous studies. To apply for merit-based scholarships, students need to submit the required documents, such as academic transcripts, proof of identity, financial statements, letters of recommendation, and a personal statement. The value of the scholarships varies, with some covering partial tuition fees and others covering full tuition fees or providing a stipend.

overview_faqs.question: What scholarships are available for BCom students at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: GRD IMT provides a range of scholarships for BCom students, awarded based on merit, financial need, sports achievements, and other criteria. To be considered for a scholarship, prospective applicants must complete a scholarship application form available from the admissions office or downloadable from the GRD IMT website. Each scholarship has its eligibility requirements, and the institute offers a variety of scholarship options to assist students in different ways.

overview_faqs.question: What is the BCom tuition fee at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for the BCom programme at GRD Institute of Management and Technology varies from INR 66,000 to INR 96,000. In addition to the tuition fee, there are other expenses such as hostel fees, mess fees, etc. However, there is a one-time fee ranging from INR 5,000 to INR 15,000 that must be paid at the time of enrollment. These fee have been sourced from the official website or authorising body and are subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What is the one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: The one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) programme at GRD IMT is INR 15,000. In addition, the tuition fee is INR 66,000, and the hostel fee is INR 2.70 lakh, bringing the total fee to INR 3.51 lakh. Those enrolling in GRD IMT courses will need to cover various fees, such as tuition, hostel, and mess fees, among others. Moreover, the mentioned fee is based on information from the official website/sanctioning body and should be considered a rough estimate, as it is subject to change.
