content.Placements: Not sure about placements case, they didn't provide an internship either. I don't know about placement of students into which company because I'm currently 3rd year student. Also, I heard from senior passed out students who told us that this college takes a long time to provide us with our own degree certificate.
content.Infrastructure: PC specs are so low that it can't even render a single video, it takes at least 15 minutes to start any software. It crashes so many times that we have to save our project every 5 minutes. Classroom is okay-okay, but there is no projector for better visual learning. They don't recharge Wi-Fi in a timely manner due to the lack of funds ig. There is a library, but it's way too far from our class.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in my course. The highest package is 20 LPA. The average package ranges between 12 LPA - 15 LPA. The lowest package varies between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Infosys, Apps Squad, Microsoft, Google, etc., are top recruiting companies for my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi available in labs and library. Good infrastructure and facilities of classrooms, library, labs, and hostel are there. Canteen food is excellent. Mess food is also average. Sports and games facilities are good. Hostel is well clean and has facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend joining this college.

content.Placements: To be honest with you sir/mam. Less than 50% of students got placed in my course. If we talk about the highest package it's around 1-2 LPA, the average package is around 1 LPA and the lowest package is Rs. 70,000 - Rs. 80,000. Top recruiters are TCS, Bebo, and Rubicon. Below 30% of students got internships. Top roles offered are engineering, data science, and cyber security.
content.Infrastructure: They don't even have Wi-Fi connections for each floor which makes it difficult to stay connected to Wi-Fi. Labs are decent not too good. Classrooms are good. The library is good, a place for students to study and work. Some of my friends are from the hostel. So they always talk about they give bad food, roti is very hard to eat, we are suffering here. If we look at the hostel building from the outside it will look fine but from the inside it's dirty, I'm not lying. The canteen is good there but they have expired food. Medical facilities are normal. Sports are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college review about placements, environment, college life, and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Smart Data Enterprises, and Infosys visit the college for placements. The internship percentage in our college is about 30%, and most of the internships are unpaid. Top roles like software engineers and testers are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: We have two grounds, one ground is big and the other is small. The library is well-facilitated and has Wi-Fi. There is a mess and canteen. Sports facilities are good but not up to the mark. Mess food quality is superb. It does not have medical facilities. We have a computer lab and a pharmacy lab.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is an average college with wonderful faculty members and an outstanding location.

content.Placements: Last year, the number of students who got placed was quite high from B.Tech CSE. The highest package offered for a B.Tech student was 12 LPA, and the average or the lowest package was 5.5 LPA. Talking about internships, from the first year only, students get opportunities to gain new skills with good companies in their fields, and sometimes these internships come with pre-placement offers, which are very helpful for the students.
content.Infrastructure: In my course, they provide four computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi built in for smooth use, and also one very spacious library. Classes are also very good. Talking about hostel facilities, the rooms are good, there is a gym, and for games, there are two grounds. Every year, they organize different tournaments.

admission_process.title: GRD Institute of Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GRD IMT admission 2025 is open. The college offers merit-based admission. Further, for BTech, MBA, Bpharma, MTech and other courses college accepts various entrance exam scores. GRD Institute of Management and Technology offers UG, PG and diploma courses in various specialisations. Students interested in admission to GRD IMT must appear for entrance exams and fill out the eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Read the below article to know more about the GRD IMT admission process, course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:

GRD Institute of Management and Technology offers both merit and entrance-based admission to all its courses. Candidates looking for admission must fill out the admission criteria to get admission. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree. After filling out the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college for admission to their respective courses. Want to know more about GRD Institute of Management and Technology course eligibility and selection criteria go through the detailed breakdown:
Class 12 withMathematicsas a compulsory subject with 50% aggregate
Class 10and Class 12 with 50% aggregate inPhysics, Chemistry and Maths from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 10, Class 12 and Graduation degree with 50% aggregate
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Physics,Chemistryand Maths or Biology from a recognised board
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in the relevant field with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) from a recognised university
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Accountancy,Economicsand Maths (as optional subject) andEnglishas main subject from a recognised board
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreGRD Institute of Management and Technology courses:

GRD Institute of Management and Technology admission procedure has a multi-step process, which has to be fulfilled by all the students to get admission. It starts with the application, students are required to apply and appear for the respective entrance exam and counselling for their desired course. Find below theGRD Institute of Management and Technology admission process 2025:

Students seeking admission to the GRD Institute of Management and Technology must full fill the admission criteria before apply for admission. After completing the criteria, students are also required to register themselves by visiting the official website.

After applying for the entrance exam accepted by the college for admission toMBA, BTech,BPharma, MTech and other courses. Additionally, for other courses, students must fill out the basic eligibility criteria which include that UG candidates must passClass 12and PG candidates must have a graduation degree.

After the final round, the college releases the merit list based on the entrance exam score and the last qualifying exam score. The students get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to submit theGRD IMT course feeto lock in the final seat.

There are three large grounds on the college premises, sufficient for sports activities. college_info.college_name: GRD IMT Dehradun Scholarship Details

paragraphs: At GRD Institute of Management and Technology (GRD IMT), merit-based scholarships are available for BCom students as well, who have demonstrated outstanding academic performance in their previous studies. To apply for merit-based scholarships, students need to submit the required documents, such as academic transcripts, proof of identity, financial statements, letters of recommendation, and a personal statement. The value of the scholarships varies, with some covering partial tuition fees and others covering full tuition fees or providing a stipend.

The tuition fee for the BCom programme at GRD Institute of Management and Technology varies from INR 66,000 to INR 96,000. In addition to the tuition fee, there are other expenses such as hostel fees, mess fees, etc. However, there is a one-time fee ranging from INR 5,000 to INR 15,000 that must be paid at the time of enrollment. These fee have been sourced from the official website or authorising body and are subject to change.

The one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) programme at GRD IMT is INR 15,000. In addition, the tuition fee is INR 66,000, and the hostel fee is INR 2.70 lakh, bringing the total fee to INR 3.51 lakh. Those enrolling in GRD IMT courses will need to cover various fees, such as tuition, hostel, and mess fees, among others. Moreover, the mentioned fee is based on information from the official website/sanctioning body and should be considered a rough estimate, as it is subject to change.

Yes, GRD Institute of Management and Technology provides merit-based scholarships for BSc students who have demonstrated outstanding academic performance in their previous studies. These scholarships usually necessitate academic transcripts, proof of identity, financial statements, letters of recommendation, and a personal statement. While eligibility requirements may vary, exceptional academic achievement is an important factor.

review_content.Placements: There were 40 students in my batch, the lowest tuition fee was 86,000 per year, but the highest was 4 lakhs per year. The internship in BDS is a compulsory rotary internship in our own college, after which we have to search for jobs ourselves. There are no placements in BDS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food was not bad compared to other hostels, but the cost was a lot. First year, it was only 45k per year, then it became 60k the next year, 78k, and now it is 94k per year. They say it's because "raw materials are higher." The hostels were a sharing system, usually 2-3 in a room. It was comparatively good. There is a library, labs are good, classrooms are good too, and we have one month every year dedicated to sports, which is good.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed a Undergraduate Dental education in India can apply for Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences MDS programme. Candidates must also complete Compulsory Rotatory Internship by March 31 of current year.Candidates should also have obtained permanent registration with the Dental Council of India or any of the State Dental Council or should obtain the same within one month from the date of admission.

Candidates who meets the eligibility criteria can apply directly on the college’s official website. There are a total of40seats available for this programme.

faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply for BDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Yes, Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences has defined the age limit to apply for BDS programme. Aspirants must have completed 17 Years of age at the time of admission or shall complete this age as on the Dec 31 of the admission year. Besides, he or she must also be medically fit to undergo the course and practice dentistry.

faqs.question: What is the qualification required to apply for BDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must have passed Karnataka PUC II examination or equivalent with Physics,Chemistryand Biology as optional subjects and English as one of the languages with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) in three subjects to apply for BDS course at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences has a total intake of 40 for BDS course. Candidates are offered seat in the programme based on their NEET score. Aspirants once selected need to participate in KEA Counselling for seat allotment. Aspirants need to report at the campus of CIDS for seat confirmation and fee payment.

faqs.question: Can I apply at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences with 65% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for BDS programme at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences. The minimum aggregate required in Class 12 is 50%. Hence, aspirants with 65% aggregate in Class 12 can apply for BDS programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in aggregate for SC/ ST category.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences without entrance exam score. The institute considers scores in NEET for BDS admission. Aspirants with a valid score in NEET MDS can get admission in the MDS programme. Once selected, aspirants need to apply for KEA Counselling for seat allotment.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for NEET for admission to BDS programme. For MDS, the selection is based on NEET MDS score of the candidate. Besides, aspirants must score equal or above the CIDS Coorg cutoff to get a seat in the institute. Candidates need to participate in KEA Counselling to get a seat in CIDS.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: No, Coorg Institute of Dental Science does not offer direct admission. The institute considers NEET and NEET MDS scores for admission to BDS and MDS programmes, respectively. Aspirants first need to apply for the accepted entrance exam and then appear for the same. Aspirants with a score equal or above CIDS cutoff are further required to participate in state-level counselling.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students from our batch get placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average stands around 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, and Accenture. Around 60% of students receive internships, mainly from companies like Wipro, HCL, and some startups. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, and System Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department has good facilities including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, smart classrooms, and a decent library. The hostel infrastructure is decent too, with clean rooms and regular maintenance. Food in the mess is hygienic, though not very diverse in taste. Medical facilities and sports grounds are available and regularly used by students. The campus is clean and has good greenery.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Best college in my opinion because we can learn.

review_content.Placements: 200 members are placed in MBBS course in our college. Internships are also present in MIMS. Dermatology is the best course in our MIMS college and different placements are present for PG preparation. It is more useful for higher studies and many roles are present in college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our hostels, there are many facilities like labs, studyroom, Wi-Fi, and library. AC rooms are also available in our hostel. The food is not good but sometimes it is good and snacks are somewhat good. On Sunday, we can eat many times and canteen also present different types of food items.

overview_faqs.question: Is Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences is a distinguished institution offering MD, MS, MBBS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences has received an impressive review rating of 4.06 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4.11 for Campus Life, 4.22 for Placements, 4.17 for Faculty, and 3.83 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences is approximately INR 67500 - INR 1296000.

review_summary.college_name: Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It's a very good college, but it has strict rules.

content.Placements: It is a professional medical degree college, in our batch, there are 200 students. The college management is providing us with five cadavers, and our college has disciplined rules and has anti-ragging communities and anti-drugs communities where some of the people are selected. It is a very good college to improve knowledge, and 80% to 90% students get their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college management provides good facilities and infrastructure. We have a projector and AC in the classroom. The library also has the AC and all types of books by different authors. Labs have good equipment, and the food is also very good. Medical facilities are also good, providing wheelchairs for the hostels for emergency situations. We can play sports and games. Our management conducts some programs to improve the spirit of students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members with more knowledge and more greenery college.

content.Placements: There will be no placements or placement offers at this college. But they will provide an internship for a year with stipend to students by attending clinical postings during that year. That stipend is based on their wish as this is a private medical college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities that college provides are good. The infrastructure structure is very good as students will be exposed to the clinical subjects in their 2nd year, only with theoretical and clinical knowledge, and a skills lab. Hostel and canteen are also fine. Ground is provided for those students who show interest in games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students from our batch get placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average stands around 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, and Accenture. Around 60% of students receive internships, mainly from companies like Wipro, HCL, and some startups. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, and System Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The department has good facilities including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, smart classrooms, and a decent library. The hostel infrastructure is decent too, with clean rooms and regular maintenance. Food in the mess is hygienic, though not very diverse in taste. Medical facilities and sports grounds are available and regularly used by students. The campus is clean and has good greenery.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best college in my opinion because we can learn.

content.Placements: 200 members are placed in MBBS course in our college. Internships are also present in MIMS. Dermatology is the best course in our MIMS college and different placements are present for PG preparation. It is more useful for higher studies and many roles are present in college.
content.Infrastructure: In our hostels, there are many facilities like labs, studyroom, Wi-Fi, and library. AC rooms are also available in our hostel. The food is not good but sometimes it is good and snacks are somewhat good. On Sunday, we can eat many times and canteen also present different types of food items.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of My College Life

content.Placements: Presently, nearly 200 students are placed in our college. The placements are based on the NEET PG entrance exam, which is conducted after the completion of the course. We must pass the exam and gain admission into a PG college, after which we receive a stipend and can work in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is very nice, highly qualified, and educated. The college has a library that provides various medical books, which helps us read without having to buy them. This is especially helpful for those who can't afford books. The mess in the hostel is good, and there is a canteen for those who want to eat. Sports and games are conducted every year.

admission_process.title: Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciencesoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include MBBS, MD and MS. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 67,500. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 66 months. PG courses are offered for 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for studies.
reviews.review_text: This institution is 25 years old. The infrastructure is also old, but they are providing new machinery every year. Laboratories and classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and sound systems. Our institution has a central library along with many department-wise libraries and museums. The hostel facility is average. Three students are occupied by a single non-air-conditioner room with an attached washroom. The quality of food is not good. Students are allowed to play various indoor and outdoo...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college because of teachers, good placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of equipment. Recently, our college has remodeled our classrooms, lecture galleries, and hostel facilities. MRI and CT scans are also available with advanced modalities. It provides intra university sports meet every year, and also has a good library with all kinds of books.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college because of faculty members, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of equipment. Recently our college has remodeled our classrooms, lecture galleries, and hostel facilities. MRI and CT scans are also available in our college with advanced facilities. Our college conducts intra-university sports meet every year. There are the best microscopes in our labs. Our library is the best, and we have 24 hours access to our library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college students got good placements in AIMS and JIPMER.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides spacious and air-conditioned classrooms with good furniture to sit comfortably in class. It provides a library 24x7 with an air-conditioned facility. The hostel rooms are neat and clean. Daily a worker will be available for cleaning of rooms. The food served in the hostel is so homely.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good, and I would recommend students to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: It provides 24X7 air-conditioned in the library. It has spacious lecture galleries for classes that were air-conditioned. The hostel rooms were clean, daily tier will be a worker for cleaning rooms. The hostel food was homely, and the infrastructure of this college was excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good private medical college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available. Wi-Fi is available for staff only and for office purposes only. We have a central library in the college. Labs are available in each department. Classrooms are centrally air-conditioned. Facilities like mess and canteen, medical, sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college and complete the MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The facilities contain a library with an air-conditioner, laboratories containing enough equipment, and lecturers and laboratory personnel. The classrooms are also air-conditioned and have enough lighting. Mess and canteen contain with average food without hygiene. Sports activities are provided like cricket ground, basketball, and volleyball courts.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college, but you don't expect much from the clinical field.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi here, but the labs are good. Classrooms are very good, and the quality of food served in the mess is low. Medical facilities are good, and there are no indoor courts. In the 1st year, dissection halls and labs are well-equipped, while in the 2nd year, labs are very good. Classrooms have central air-conditioning, and all books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but there is stress because of the rules of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like air-conditioned classrooms and a library. The hostel is non-air-conditioned. The college has good microscopes. The food served in the hostel is average, and the food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available for 24 hours. For sports, it does not have a well-equipped ground, but we play games on that ground only.

reviews.review_heading: Interesting things of my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, labs are well-equipped, classrooms have central air conditioning. Hostel facility is also good and sports are there with a very big ground but the physical trainer is not that good. A physiotherapy clinic is also present. Food is okay in the canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: An overview of D.Pharma(Doctor of Pharmacy) course.

review_content.Placements: 30 students are selected for a batch. The course fee is about 202000. Several recruitment opportunities are provided by our college. Internship program conducted in the NIMS hospital Araalummoodu TVM. Those who have completed the 5th year of course are eligible for the 6th year internship program.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and libraries are well maintained and updated. Hostel facilities are up to the mark. Per month, 5,000 hostel fee is there. Canteen facilities are available. Medical facilities are available, like first aid kits and other paint killers, OTC medicine, etc. Sports facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good pharmacy college that offers good courses and placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college was started more than 7 years ago. Top roles offered in this course are in manufacturing medicines and prescribing doctors medicine for treatment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is average but has a very good atmosphere. Canteen is very good that provides sweets, snacks, and meals before 4:30 PM. It offers B. Pharm and diploma courses. Our college has 4 floors. On the top floor, a big library is available. There are good labs for all the subjects. Classrooms have projectors for good learning and a good infrastructure. Hostels are good, neat, and clean. They served good Kerela-style food items. There are separate bathrooms on both floors.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Arawali Veterinary College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

review_content.Placements: Around 80-100% of students got placed in our batch. After completing graduation, students can find jobs by themselves. This course provides government job opportunities. Our college provides internship opportunities for students to boost their clinical experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides separate classrooms for every subject. The library has many books. A clinic is available to perform various activities on patients. Our college has a laboratory.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified and experienced. They help us in theory. Students who work hard can easily pass the exam. They help students in their procedure on the patient. They suggest reading books for a better experience. They conduct regular examinations, which help students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a no.1 private veterinary college of India.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students are going for PG. None of our seniors are free. They are good surgeons having great knowledge. They still help the juniors in many cases. The college is very knowledgeable and seniors are good advisors that are important for logically learning after college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are good like classrooms and labs but some facilities are missing in our college which is not much important. Hostels are of every type air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned. Girls have separate hostels with separate play areas. Games are also available. Mess food is a bit less than homemade. A canteen is available with a limited but good resource of food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has an underwhelming college life. Opt for this college only if you love this course.

review_content.Placements: As this is a professional course the placements depend on what the person wants to do. The highest salary offered will be Rs. 70,000 per month, and the lowest will be Rs. 40,000 per month. The average salary offered is around Rs. 50.000 per month. This college offers a doctor's degree in veterinary medicine.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good with 100% electricity and water. The infrastructure is underwhelming. There is a library under construction, and the old library contains all the things you need, and nothing more than that. Food in the mess is great. Badminton, basketball, and table tennis equipment is provided .

college_info.college_name: The Global Open University

highlights.summary:
The Global Open University (TGOU) is a distance learning university located in Dimapur, Nagaland which was established in 2006. It is a joint public-private partnership venture between the Government of Nagaland and the World Institution Building Programme (WIBP). The University is recognized by UGC, Ministry of Human Resource Development, Government of India, AIU and DEC. It offers UG, PG, Diploma, Advance Diploma programmes in the streams of Management & Commerce, Health & Medical Sciences, Ecology & Environment, Law & Juridical Science, Psychology & Counseling, Education, Journalism & Mass Communication, Computers & Information Technology, Library & Information Science, Applied Science, Social Science and Tourism, Travel & Hospitality Management. Admissions to all the programmes is granted on the basis of merit.

The Global Open University offers distance education degree/diploma programmes at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the streams of Management & Commerce, Health & Medical Sciences, Ecology & Environment, Law & Juridical Science, Psychology & Counseling, Education, Journalism & Mass Communication, Computers & Information Technology, Library & Information Science, Applied Science, Social Science and Tourism, Travel & Hospitality Management.

The University also offers Diploma, Advanced Diploma, and Post Graduate Diploma, short-term online certificate courses apart from its distance education degree courses. Below are important details of The Global Open University admission process that an applicant must know of:

The University offers 127 courses across 11 streams. Some of the popular The Global Open University courses are listed below along with their specialisations, eligibility, and fee:

The University has a placement cell which offers placement assistance to the students and enhances their skills in order to shape their careers. The Global Open University placement cell is visited by top recruiters like Taj Group, Vivanta, Raddison, Lemon Tree and Le Meridien.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What salary can I expect after completing Disaster Management course?
overview_faqs.answer: The Disaster Management salary expert might vary owing to a variety of factors, one of which is experience. Students can start their careers at a minimum salary of INR 2-3 LPA and can earn up to INR 10-12 LPA with experience. A fresh graduate in disaster management makes INR 5.5 LPA on average. A disaster management professional's salary may differ based on their area of expertise, level of education and experience. The industry a Disaster Management professional works in can also affect their Disaster Management salary.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of a fashion designer in India?
overview_faqs.answer: For an entry-level, the salary starts from INR 3.92 LPA. After having more than 10 years of experience depending upon your skill you can earn INR 30-35 LPA in India. Fashion Designers have lots of opportunities to work in big companies, foriegn countries, etc. However, it all depends upon the skill you have, how good you are in designing, and how is your creativity. I hope it will help. You can reach out to us for further queries.Thank You.

admission_process.title: The Global Open University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The Global Open University admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.The Global Open Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. Some of the courses include B.Lib.I.Sc., BHMTT, MSW and M.Lib.I.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 12,150 - 38,550. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 1 year - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. The final shortlist for admission to the M.Sc. programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What is the scope after qualifying UGC NET?
faqs.answer: This is for the candidates who want to do PhD research or become Assistant professor. However, other career options can be PSUs jobs as well.The candidates who do not want to join any PSU can take up other options like online tutor, open their own coaching centres, guest faculty, consultant, Lab Trainer, IP lead, Author, Editor, Executive, Program Executive, etc.For conclusion we can say that the candidates qualifying for the UGC NET exam can take up any job they want or start their ow business after clearing one of the most the toughest exams in India.

Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. College offers B.Sc. and MBBS courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MD and MS. The ACSR Government Medical College course fee ranges between INR 45,000 to 54,000.

faqs.answer: A:    During the ACSR Government Medical College cutoff 2024, the closing ranks needed to get into ACSR Government Medical College varied between 3171 and,  37438 for the General AI category candidates. Considering the cutoff data, the MD in General Medicine was the most competitive specialisation, with a cutoff rank of 3171 for General category students in the AI quota. So, considering the latest round, students must aim to secure a rank between the cut-off range given above for ACSR Government Medical College for MD/MS admission.
faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get ACSR Government Medical College?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into ACSR Government Medical College for MBBS course, candidates need to acquire a rank below than 19820.  The ACSR Government Medical College cutoff 2024 for the MBBS course stood at 19820, which is comparatively higher than the acquired rank of 7k. So, it is possible to get into the institute with 7k rank under General AI category quota. Similarly, for OBC quota, the cutoff stood at 20678. faqs.question: What NEET rank is required for getting admission into the ACSR Government Medical College for an MBBS? I have 7k?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates preparing for the NEET exam to seek admission into ACSR Government Medical College must possess minimum 50 percentiles in class 12 to be eligible for the NEET exam. So,  70 percentiles are more than enough to get into the college via NEET exam. Candidates can further check out more about the NEET UG eligibility criteria:Below are the NEET 2024 eligibility criteria with respect to the educational background or marks obtained in the qualifying exam.Candidates must have passed Physics,  Chemistry,  Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects individually in the qualifying examination.Candidates must have studied this subject as core or additional subjects.Candidates belonging to the General category must have scored a minimum of 50 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribes/ Other Backward should have a minimum score of 40 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates, who belong to the General category and are applying under the Persons with Disability (PWD) Quota, must have a minimum score of 45 per cent marks in the qualifying examination.

review_content.Placements: About 175 students are joining every year at our college, and approximately 100 students will get an internship in our college every year. There is less number of detained candidates in our college, but there is a vacancy for attendees post here. Internees are offered a salary of around Rs. 17,000 per month for their duty in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are hostels for boys, girls, internees and senior residents separately. College staff members are provided with separate quarters for staying. There is a library in college with a lot of books. Classrooms are well-equipped with mic, PowerPoint presentation slides, good ventilation and benches, and there is a central equipped air-conditioner for final year students. There is a separate dining hall for both boys and girls in a common building.

overview_faqs.question: Can ACSR Government Medical College be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at ACSR Government Medical College are MBBS, MS, MD, B.Sc. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, ACSR Government Medical College has a rating of 4.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.9, 4.6, 4.6 and 4.7 as per reviews by students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Get ready to make memories that you cannot forget.

content.Placements: There is no need to worry about the internship and future practice options. The college itself provides an internship after the final year and guides us in our future courses. The practice here is very good, and you can get clinical exposure early, which helps us to interact with patients more often. This college has good practice.
content.Infrastructure: At first, you all may think the campus is a bit clumsy, but it's the most beautiful one you can get at this university. The library is very calm and decent, provided with air-conditioners, and helps us to concentrate on our studies. The food here is very good, and I believe it's the best compared to other campuses. The hostel is very nice and provides all the facilities needed, and the memories you will make.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives good experience for students.

content.Placements: All the students get internships in our courses in different hospitals. Some of them got roles as professors. The salary packages depend on the score of the students. After getting the experience, they get higher roles like the principal of the college and controller of examinations.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college are very good. Many labs and classrooms available are very clean. There is a huge library with many books and an e-library is also available. The food is very good. Sports are available in our college.

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty. But need some improvement on behalf of the hospital. Infrastructure was excellent.

reviews.review_text: At first, you all may think the campus is a bit clumsy, but it's the most beautiful one you can get at this university. The library is very calm and decent, provided with air-conditioners, and helps us to concentrate on our studies. The food here is very good, and I believe it's the best compared to other campuses. The hostel is very nice and provides all the facilities needed, and the memories you will make.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives good experience for students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college are very good. Many labs and classrooms available are very clean. There is a huge library with many books and an e-library is also available. The food is very good. Sports are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the environment, good infrastructure and cleanliness within the campus.
reviews.review_text: There are hostels for boys, girls, internees and senior residents separately. College staff members are provided with separate quarters for staying. There is a library in college with a lot of books. Classrooms are well-equipped with mic, PowerPoint presentation slides, good ventilation and benches, and there is a central equipped air-conditioner for final year students. There is a separate dining hall for both boys and girls in a common building.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with great infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text:
1) It has best infrastructure among all the government medical colleges.Classrooms and labs are well built and equipped. Central and e-library facilities were there.
2) Good qualities of food, medical facilities are there with clean and neat hostel. Annual sports meets will be conducted in playground.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty. But need some improvement on behalf of the hospital. Infrastructure was excellent.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure and classrooms. There is an air-conditioned library with Wi-Fi and good facilities. There is a newly established hostel. There are good facilities along with the mess and canteen. There are a few sports and games. Each room can occupy three members. There is a good water facility. The canteen was also present.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility, but labs and classrooms are awesome. The library is available but not in a separate building as other medical colleges. As our college is established in the year 2014, it has been a short time, so hostels are good. Food served in the mess is good as it is run by our students only. Few sports like cricket, table tennis, badminton and volleyball are available. Medical facilities are good. Canteen is closed in the previous year, and it is not yet opened.

reviews.review_heading: Good staff and a friendly environment. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good water and current facilities were available. The infrastructure is very good, with spacious and ventilated classrooms. A central library is also present. The food is good, with different dishes available daily. As we are medicos, medical facilities are very good here. Sports and games are also well-supported.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best medical College in Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: In MBBS course we have labs for each department eg. Dissection hall, pathology lab, physiology lab, biochemistry lab, etc. Our college has an library and the classrooms are highly ventilated and has projector. Hostel include mess, grounds for each sports like cricket ground, football ground, tennis court, basketball court, etc. The rooms are cleaned daily and the bathrooms are okay. The food in mess is very good.

reviews.review_heading: ACSR is serving people with kindness.
reviews.review_text: We do have separate auditoriums for the students of different years, with good projectors and decent sound system. The library is fully equipped and furnished with all kinds of standard books. It has centralised air-conditioners. Wi-Fi support is also available.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college, and they provided good placements in 2018.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi were good. There were many fibers net structure so we can get 1 GBPS which is the best interest speed. There are many labs and classrooms were also had wide space and monitors. We also had a library, and the quality of the facilities was good. The food served in the mess was very good. Sports and games were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty, infrastructure and placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Excellent quality and quantity of food available in mess and canteen, medical facilities are good. Sports and games are available in the college. A lot of sports activities are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best college in odisha

review_content.Placements: It is a government medical college, so its certificate has value while going for a junior residency or any tutor job. Due to good academics, students get better placements. Two batches have passed out from this college, and maximum students got government Medical Officer and private junior residency and government junior residency positions. Also, many students got PG (post-graduate) admissions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure for both academics and hostels. The hostel is provided with Wi-Fi and a recreation room for indoor activities. A 24/7 canteen is available. Hostels have study rooms with AC. A gym is also available 24/7. The library has all the books required during MBBS.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Best government medical college in Northern Odisha.

review_content.Placements: This is a college facilitating a batch of 100 students only. All the students who are enrolled in this college are able to secure an internship after the end of the course. This course can help a graduate secure jobs like a junior president in a hospital, a chief medical officer in health care centres, or tutors in medical colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms, laboratories, and library are well-maintained with functional air-conditioners. In addition to that, we have a study room and a cafeteria in the academic block itself. Talking about the hostels, all the services provided here are of top-notch quality. Food is of average quality.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the students and faculty members here.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement, but in the future, hoping for the best. They don't give any stipend to students, and interns are working here for free. Hoping in future years, we will be getting paid by the GS Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel has three people in a single room with an almirah, a chair, and a table with a Bed. The classroom is for a hundred students with Wi-Fi supplied. review_content.Placements: By this profession, you can become an Ayurvedic doctor. If you have the potential then you can achieve a great success. The demand of Ayurveda is increasing day by day, so this course is good. .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infra is good but they can do better. Playground area is very nice and the classes are good. But electricity is a problem here. Management is not good. But the teachers are helpful. Infra is average overall.

faqs.answer: GS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityUG DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10+2 from the recognised board/council.B.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

review_summary.college_name: GS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of GS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: Placements are not generally in medical. But I think they provide placement. It is very nice. Placements are very good. We have 1 year of internship where they teach us all clinically based topics and interact with patients effectively, so we don't have placement, only internship is there.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good and nice. They are building a new hostel. They reconstructed the road. They have ample number of hostel, and they are increasing their class capacity. They made a huge canteen recently. They have a big cricket ground. There is one small ground.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2031
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the students and faculty members here.

content.Placements: There is no placement, but in the future, hoping for the best. They don't give any stipend to students, and interns are working here for free. Hoping in future years, we will be getting paid by the GS Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has three people in a single room with an almirah, a chair, and a table with a Bed. The classroom is for a hundred students with Wi-Fi supplied. The library is also built greatly, having all books, especially Ayurvedic and modern aspects. They have all types.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college and it is value for money.

content.Placements: By this profession, you can become an Ayurvedic doctor. If you have the potential then you can achieve a great success. The demand of Ayurveda is increasing day by day, so this course is good. .
content.Infrastructure: The infra is good but they can do better. Playground area is very nice and the classes are good. But electricity is a problem here. Management is not good. But the teachers are helpful. Infra is average overall.
content.Faculty: The university always does negligence in conducting the exams on time. Otherwise, the college conducts regular tests and exams, on time. The college does everything for a student. The college wants its students to be the best.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good for students who want to be BAMS graduates.

content.Placements: I am in my 3rd in this college. I pursued this course in 2019. The placements are not clear. The 1st batch of the college is of 2016 batch, which is currently in the internship phase. But the placements are expected to be much better than the other private colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. It has almost all the facilities. All the departments have different laboratories with almost all the equipment. A central library, herbal garden, cricket ground, football ground, volleyball court, basketball court. etc., are well managed by the group.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in GS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
GS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityUG DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10+2 from the recognised board/council.B.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes.
Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'.
